summary: P2 batch verified end-to-end on the public preview URL. Backend: 6/6 pytest tests passed (SSE streaming endpoint returns text/event-stream with delta chunks and final {done:true}; /api/send-email returns 422 on invalid EmailStr/missing field and a graceful 500 with 'domain is not verified' detail as expected). Frontend: stream-all-btn progressively fills all 6 starter-layout blocks live (final lengths [71,379,865,770,927,529] chars); brief-topic-input persists across reload after 400ms debounce; newsletter-title-input persists across reload; Send-test-email invalid-email path shows 'valid email address' toast and does NOT call /api/send-email; valid-email path produces a graceful Sonner toast 'Couldn't send — Failed to send email: The beastlyfacts.com domain is not verified...' and the app remains usable. Regression: dashboard-new-article-btn -> new-article-confirm-btn still lands on /edit/<id>.

minor.issue: X-Accel-Buffering:no header set by FastAPI is stripped by the Cloudflare/ingress proxy in the public response (only present internally). SSE still streams via Transfer-Encoding: chunked so functionality is unaffected; only matters if a future nginx hop buffers.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py llm_complete still accepts max_tokens but never forwards it to LlmChat — carry-over from earlier iterations, not a blocker.

server.py /api/send-email wraps Resend errors as HTTP 500 with the raw provider message in `detail`. That is good UX-wise (graceful) but it does leak the full provider URL https://resend.com/domains to the client; consider mapping to a sanitized message + a `code` field if the surface ever becomes public.

Frontend stream-all flow runs blocks sequentially (each call awaited) — works fine but with 6 blocks the user waits ~30s+. Future opt: parallelize independent blocks via Promise.all on the streamBlock readers.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (streaming fill, debounced persistence x2, invalid-email validation, graceful Resend-domain error toast, new-article regression — all passed)

test_credentials: N/A — single-user localStorage app, no auth.
seed_data_creation: Created two drafts via the confirm flow in test browser contexts (draft_z3yc0s784sb, draft_2r8axjab621). Lives only in playwright session localStorage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features (per-block SSE streaming, Send test email, debounced localStorage persistence) are all working as specified. The Resend send returning HTTP 500 with 'domain is not verified' is INTENTIONAL — the beastlyfacts.com sender domain is not yet verified in Resend. To fully exercise email success, the user would need to verify the sender domain in Resend. Tests file at /app/backend/tests/test_p2_features.py is reusable for regression. Streaming test polls the readable stream and asserts >0 delta events + final {done:true} sentinel. The X-Accel-Buffering header is stripped by Cloudflare on the public route — kept the test relaxed.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration. The expected Resend 'domain not verified' 500 is correctly surfaced as a Sonner toast titled 'Couldn't send' with a descriptive body, and the UI does not crash.
